reviews.comment:
Muy viejo todo. Obsoleto comparado a otros Ypf Aca. Mal café, medialunas secas.

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very old. Obsolete compared to other YPF Aca stations. Bad coffee, dry croissants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNTZta2dBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El espacio del salón bar es muy agradable y está bien atendido. Hacemos reuniones ejecutivas y de amigos allí. Un buen estar.

(Translated by Google)
The lounge bar is very pleasant and well-staffed. We hold business meetings and meetings with friends there. A good time.
